summary: Full E2E testing of Vyntrix Script Hub — backend (13 pytest cases) and frontend (Playwright full UX flow). All tests passed. Verified: health, channel info, videos list (52 returned), auth (login ok/401 + me), admin-protected PUT/DELETE scripts with persistence in /api/videos, search no-results, sort buttons, Get Script modal, admin login, edit-script save+persistence across reload, donate modal copy, settings (light theme + accent), UGPhone affiliate link, logout hides edit buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: CORS defaults to '*' while allow_credentials=True — Starlette will silently drop credentials with wildcard. For production, set CORS_ORIGINS explicitly to the frontend origin.
No brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login. Low risk given single admin account, but consider rate limiting for public hardening.
YouTube responses cached 5 min in-process only; OK for single-worker supervisor setup.
ScriptUpdate accepts any string; consider validating URL format (HttpUrl) to reject invalid entries.
server.py is a single file (~360 lines) — acceptable but could be split (auth/youtube/scripts routers) if it grows.
No data-testid on the video grid container, only on individual cards — fine for current tests.
test_credentials: Admin Vyntrix / c4222009 — valid, token-based auth (localStorage 'vx_token')
seed_data_creation: Script entries are created/removed during tests using TEST_ prefix on a real YouTube video_id; tests clean up via DELETE or explicit remove.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. YouTube API is live (real key) — watch quota during retests; fetch_all_videos has 5-minute TTL cache so repeated runs are cheap. Frontend flows all use data-testid and are stable. Admin token stored in localStorage key 'vx_token'. For frontend tests, remember to dismiss a possible window.confirm() during the remove-script flow (already handled via page.on('dialog')).
